questions.question: When the seventh seal was opened, what happened in heaven?
options: Silence for about half an hour
questions.correct: Silence for about half an hour
questions.feedback: When the seventh seal was opened, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.

questions.question: How many angels were given trumpets?
questions.feedback: Seven angels who stand before God were given seven trumpets.

questions.question: At the first trumpet, hail and fire mixed with blood were hurled to earth.
questions.feedback: Hail and fire mixed with blood were hurled to earth, burning a third of the earth.

questions.question: A third of the sea turned into _____.
questions.feedback: A third of the sea turned into blood when something like a mountain was thrown into it.

questions.question: A great star fell from the sky, blazing like a torch, and its name was _____.
questions.feedback: The star was called Wormwood, and it made a third of the waters bitter.
